hook.name: KanroHook
hook.description:
KANRO is a Uniswap v4 hook designed to route 3% of swap volume from supported pools directly to humanitarian and public-good initiatives on Ethereum.

3% of swap volume is automatically routed on-chain to the Kanro Fund, Vitalik Buterin’s charitable initiative supporting humanitarian relief, public health, and open-source public goods

Funds connected to the Kanro ecosystem have supported:

Pandemic and public health initiatives
Open-source biotech and longevity research
Humanitarian relief e...
